{
  "mode": "diagnose_leak",

    "suspected_cause": "Persistent mlde_shadow_advisor=error since 2026-07-01 combined with absent leakage_check artifact creates an unverified pipeline segment. The shadow advisor's repeated failure means its outputs (and any upstream feature construction feeding it) have not been validated for point-in-time integrity or distributional consistency across the 9-day failure window. The skipped heavy jobs (cpcv_validator, optuna_optimizer, dl3_foundation, thompson_sampling) further mean cross-validation and OOS-gap checks that would normally surface leakage or drift have not run during this period. The anthropic SDK install triggering a one-shot E2E rerun suggests an environment-level dependency change that may have silently altered feature availability or timestamp handling in the shadow advisor path without accompanying leakage re-screening.",

        "source_class": "name_pattern_check"

        "source_class": "name_pattern_check"

    ],
